positive: Stylized symmetrical wreath pattern featuring tropical bioluminescent flora (ferns, monstera leaves) interwoven with celestial astronomical elements (constellations, crescent moons, stylized nebulae). Use a high-contrast color palette dominated by deep midnight indigo, teal, and electric neon blue accents. The design must maintain clean, distinct silhouettes and strong contrast, suitable for single-color or two-color screen printing on dark apparel. Minimalist composition, intricate details, symmetrical, vector art style, clean lines.
negative: blur, watermark, text, signature, logo, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noisy, jpeg artifacts, lowres, poorly drawn, messy, cluttered, realistic photo, gradient background
